DASHBOARD.descrizione: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.

comandi.vram: Displays VRAM details and GPU load.

FILE_MANAGER.descrizione: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.

comandi.list:percorso: Lists files and folders (e.g., list:desktop, list:core, list:plugins).
comandi.conta:percorso: Provides a detailed count of items in a folder.
comandi.read:percorso: Reads the content of a text file (configurable lines).

ROLEPLAY.descrizione: Manages roleplay mode: loads characters and scenes for immersive conversations.

comandi.load:nome: Loads the specified character (e.g., load: wizard).
comandi.unload: Deactivates roleplay and returns to normal personality.

SYSTEM.descrizione: Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics, system utilities.

comandi.riavvia: Immediate Cold Reboot of the core.
comandi.terminale: Opens a new CMD Prompt window.
comandi.leggi log: Reads the latest logged system events.
comandi.errori: Analyzes only the latest crashes or failures.
comandi.apri:programma: Opens a default program (notepad, chrome, visual studio, sillytavern).
comandi.esplora:percorso: Opens a folder in Explorer (e.g., explore:desktop, explore:download).

SYSTEM.esempio: [SYSTEM: leggi log] o [SYSTEM: terminale] o [SYSTEM: ora]

WEB.descrizione: Network access for Google searches and quick opening of websites.

comandi.search:query: Executes a Google search for the specified term.
comandi.open:url: Opens a web address in the default browser.

WEB.esempio: [WEB: search: chi è Root Admin] oppure [WEB: open: youtube.com]

WEBCAM.descrizione: Access to PC optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin.

comandi.snap: Activates the camera and saves an image in the 'scatti' folder.

MODELS.descrizione: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).

comandi.set:numero: Changes the active model using the list number (e.g., set:7).
comandi.lista: Displays available models for the current backend.
